title: Trump says U.S. asked China to delay Xi meeting 'a month or so' due to Iran war
summary_full: The Iran war wasn't expected to derail the Trump-Xi meeting in China, but analysts said it would influence the talks and any agreements that come out of them.
summary_public: The Iran war wasn't expected to derail the Trump-Xi meeting in China, but analysts said it would influence the talks and any agreements that come out of them.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran war wasn't expected to derail the Trump-Xi meeting
